item.title: Return of the Meme: 1374 (Star Trek Sunday again)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I don't honestly know how much longer I'm gonna last.
I am becoming more unhinged. I feel it. I feel crumbly, like drought-scorched earth. Dusty.
If there was a local billionaire, I'd probably end up trying to use that as a way out of existence tbh.
Everything I know about sports that I didn't learn from Terry Pratchett's Unseen Academicals was against my will.
I'll be starting Voyager soon.
Too bad, you will. Just like everyone else human I've tried to date.
This also means Frasier was a Holodeck program, and I'm okay with that.
I don't normally partake but I would with these two lol
If any of you are protesting out there in LA, give them hell. I wish I could join you.
Amen to that, Jake. I love all you ladies.
Me, for like two hours daily now.
I wonder if everyone was as outraged about DS9 as they were about the "wokeness" of Discovery.
Filing this statement for later use.
Yup.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "I love you too!" [alarm calls] "thank you, thank you." [Kissing noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: And there's the nationwide martial law declaration
item.description: Don't let Nazi liars claim otherwise, this is a nationwide declaration of martial law for an indefinite time period. These fascist fucks think they can fool people by not outright calling it martial law, but read the order. It gives Hesgeth the authority to activate any number of U.S. military personnel anywhere in the nation for any length of time. That's martial law.
item.dc:creator: walnutbreath

item.title: What Happened Today #128
item.description: Tanks began arriving in Washington today for Trump's birthday parade while he orders troops to California to confront protesters, but concerted resistance is beginning. Next weekend: 1,000+ No Kings protest events. California threatened to cut off $80 billion in federal funding, 700,000 people flooded WorldPride in DC despite safety fears, and two tribes are suing over $23 billion stolen from their children's education. Our country is escalating to authoritarianism, and we're starting to escalate right back. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/troops-sent-la 2. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-returned 3. https://go.govbrief.today/al-qaida-threatens-trump 4. https://go.govbrief.today/parade-tanks-arriving 5. https://go.govbrief.today/starlink-white-house 6. https://go.govbrief.today/va-contracts-ai 7. https://go.govbrief.today/nasa-space-x-alternative 8. https://go.govbrief.today/geier-cdc-access 9. https://go.govbrief.today/washoe-wichita-sue 10. https://go.govbrief.today/world-pride-dc 11. https://go.govbrief.today/newark-flights-restricted 12. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-warns-musk 13. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cut-ca-funding Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/proud-boys-sue Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/newsom-threatens-taxes Subscribe Free & Private - https://govbrief.today ****Important - Imgur**** I've been blocked from chat. I honestly have no idea why. Hopefully it's a mistake. I have had one great interaction with Imgur support who is sending me to another group, and I obviously hope to learn what's going on when they return to work. Until then, if you've written me, I promise I'm not ignoring you. I'll keep you all posted!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

She’s a dummy
Here is the dummy!
If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: Celebrating 9th Year Cake Day With A Meme Dump
item.description:
1. I VOLUNTEER!
2. DIOS MIO
3. At least this is one fight that he didn't fake
4. Saving for later
5. A standoff
6. Name two songs that you like that are like this
7. The Average Day of a Cat Owner
8. Has German Engineering Gone Too Far?
9. I refuse to believe this is not CGI
10. "It's not what it looks like" P.S. Labs and Goldens can do that without harming, the chicken is fine
11. Paying for stuff in 2024
12. - "Hop in buddy!" - "Thanks!"
13. 90's
14. Any good dump will be wasted without some useful information
15. Today is a special day, so I kind of want to soft-announce what I'm working on next. I'm going for a really ambitious psychological horror game based on one of the most controversial real-life experiments of all time (The Milgram Experiment). I plan to mix that with a variety of "Trolley Problem"-like situations. So you would be able to kill, torture or spare the guilty or the innocent. I've never worked on something as dark, but I feel quite excited about taking on this challenge. Check out the game on Steam, if it's not too much trouble, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: The bots need some new material
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.title: Added some OYGBIV to my very R neighborhood!
item.description: My first post! I feel like it's a good time to convey a little hope and positivity...It's not much, but we wanted to show support in an area that's very red. Need to adjust the lights a bit, but I think it looks nice. Hang in there everyone and stay weird! Just wanted to thank everyone for the enthusiastic response. Love the 'tude this community has! Being unique is celebrated and I love it!
item.dc:creator: Psychedelifragilisticexpialidocious

item.description: Trump sending National Guard to LA in response to anti-ICE protests. Hesgeth say Marines fro Camp Pendelton have been put on alert for deployment.

item.title: Phone clearing dump pt 7
item.description:
How can you have any pudding if you haven't eaten your meat??!
You never know what you'll see on the greenock train. I was once the weird passenger, I'd dressed as the wicked witch for work Halloween contest and had to get the 5pm train still wearing the green make up
Potato tax - she steals my comfy nest and rearranges the squishmallows
item.dc:creator: DevilPieBandit
